question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/ParserProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Unintended permanent freezing of funds'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the 20ms polling frequency to create a timing attack where a TOKENFREEZE stream file is downloaded and parsed in one poll cycle, but the TOKENUNFREEZE stream file is not yet available in cloud storage during the next poll cycle, and a subsequent parser crash before the file becomes available causes permanent freeze?
